Home.title: A focused place where every workout turns into visible progress.
Home.description: Track sessions, manage training load and build consistent habits with a cleaner interface and a server-first product foundation.
Home.featureOneDescription: Log your workouts, track training weights, and analyze performance to stay on course toward your fitness goals.
Home.featureTwoDescription: The system analyzes your metrics and helps you increase training load at the right time for consistent progress.
Home.featureThreeDescription: Create training and nutrition plans, monitor task completion, and track athlete progress from a single platform.

Dashboard.title: Welcome back, {name}
Dashboard.subtitle: Here's your fitness overview for today

errors.profile: Profile data is temporarily unavailable. Showing the data we could load.
errors.stats: Stats are temporarily unavailable. Showing an empty state until the backend responds again.
errors.profileAndStats: Profile and stats are temporarily unavailable. The page stays accessible, but some data could not be loaded.

cards.workoutsWeekHint: +{count} in the rest of the month

activity.title: Recent Activity
activity.subtitle: Your latest workout and performance overview
activity.bestLiftDescription: Strongest set available in your stats
activity.muscleFocusDescription: Where your current training volume is landing
activity.monthSummaryDescription: Volume and frequency across the current period
activity.emptySecondary: Your stats will appear after the first workouts

approval.rejectDescription: Provide a rejection reason for this registration request.

AdminUserDetails.description: Inspect the profile, plans, sessions, and exercise analytics for a specific user.

activePlan.description: The current plan that best represents the user's active training work.
activePlan.empty: This user does not have an active plan yet.

recentSessions.title: Recent sessions
recentSessions.description: The latest recorded workout sessions with exercise and set details.

topExercises.title: Top exercises
topExercises.description: High-performing exercises ranked by usage and performance snapshots.

stats.title: Training analytics
stats.description: Summary metrics, recent cadence, muscle-group distribution, and best lifts.

plans.title: Training plans
plans.description: Assigned and authored plans, including workout days and exercise targets.
plans.empty: No plans found in this section.

sessions.title: Session history
sessions.description: Paginated workout history with optional date filtering.

exerciseProgress.title: Exercise progress
exerciseProgress.description: Exercise-level performance summaries and recent tracked entries.
exerciseProgress.empty: No exercise progress data is available.

planDetails.author: Author

sessionDetails.noExercises: No exercises were logged for this session.

progressDetails.noEntries: No progress entries were recorded yet.

Profile.title: Profile settings
Profile.description: Review and update the current user's data.
Profile.error: Unable to load the current user profile.

gymCoinGuide.title: How GymCoin works
gymCoinGuide.description: GymCoin unlocks actions in the app and makes your progress more visible.
gymCoinGuide.earnedDescription: Coins are granted for daily login and for successful actions that the system marks as rewarded.
gymCoinGuide.spentDescription: Right now GymCoin is used for creating a training plan, a workout day, and an exercise.
gymCoinGuide.rulesTitle: How it behaves in the UI
gymCoinGuide.rulesDescription: Before a paid action the app checks your balance, and after a successful operation the wallet and history refresh automatically.

card.title: My profile
card.description: You can update the email and password for your account.
card.name: Name

edit.title: Edit profile
edit.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty if you don't want to change it

TrainingSessions.title: Training sessions
TrainingSessions.description: Review workout sessions recorded by {name}, including every completed set.
TrainingSessions.error: Unable to load your training sessions: {message}

list.title: Session history
list.description: Every logged workout session is listed here with its completed sets.
list.empty: You have not recorded any training sessions yet.

details.title: Training session
details.error: Unable to load this training session: {message}

card.title: Session details
card.emptyDescription: Check the session ID or try again later.
card.noSets: No completed sets were saved for this session.

edit.title: Edit training session
edit.description: Update the completed sets for this training session.
edit.noSets: This session has no sets to edit yet.
edit.emptySets: Add at least one completed set before saving.
edit.incompleteSet: Each edited set must include weight, reps and RIR.

delete.confirmDescription: This action removes the training session and all completed sets saved inside it.

ProgressPage.title: Exercise progress
ProgressPage.description: Track how {name} is progressing across working sets, volume and estimated strength.

picker.title: Choose an exercise
picker.description: Select one of your exercises to load every logged set and the chart-ready summary.

panel.title: Progress overview
panel.summaryDescription: Volume is shown as bars, while estimated 1RM is shown as the line.
panel.historyDescription: Every logged set for the selected exercise appears below.
panel.noSelection: Choose an exercise to view its progress.
panel.empty: No progress data has been recorded for this exercise yet.
panel.chartEmpty: There is not enough summary data to draw the chart yet.

layout.title: Build a consistent training system and keep your progress visible.
layout.description: Training Diary helps you log workouts, see progress clearly, and stay disciplined without a cluttered interface.
layout.cardOneDescription: Create your account, wait for approval, and move straight into plans, workouts, and progress tracking.
layout.cardTwoDescription: Core actions live in one place: plans, sessions, activity history, and GymCoin are all available without unnecessary complexity.

form.unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.loginAccountNotFound: No account was found with these details. Check the email or sign up.
form.loginInvalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect. Check your details and try again.
form.approvalPendingTitle: Your account has been sent for admin approval.
form.approvalPendingDescription: As soon as an administrator approves the request, you will be able to sign in and continue using Training Diary.
form.approvalPendingServerMessage: Registration request created. Wait for admin approval.
form.approvalRejectedDescription: Review the rejection reason below and submit a new request if needed.
form.registerFormDescription: Set up access and start your profile.

register.title: Create your Training Diary account
register.description: Create your account and start logging your training in a cleaner, more focused interface.

login.title: Sign in to Training Diary
login.description: Keep tracking your progress, workouts and consistency in one place.

TrainingPlans.title: Training Plans
TrainingPlans.description: Browse approved community training plans. Guests can view the full structure, and signed-in users additionally receive liked and saved flags from the backend.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: The public catalog supports search, author filtering, sorting and pagination.

list.title: Approved plans
list.description: Only plans with approved status are rendered in this list.

list.managedByCoachDescription: This plan was created and assigned to you by a coach, so you cannot edit its structure on your own.

actionButtons.rejectDescription: Provide a rejection reason. It will be stored as rejectionReason.

board.title: Plans ready for workout days
board.description: Choose a plan and attach a new workout day to it.
board.empty: You do not have any plans available for adding workout days yet.
board.noReason: There is no rejection reason, or the plan has not been rejected.
board.managedByCoachDescription: You can record sessions and view history for this plan, but you cannot change the plan, workout days, or exercises yourself.
board.workoutDaysEmpty: This plan does not expose any workout days for editing yet.
board.exercisesEmpty: There are no exercises in this workout day yet.

createDay.title: New workout day
createDay.description: After adding a workout day, the plan receives pending status again.
createDay.gymCoinDescription: Adding a workout day costs GymCoin. We verify access before saving.

deletePlan.confirmDescription: The entire plan will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

recordSession.title: New training session
recordSession.description: Enter the sets you actually completed for exercises in this plan.
recordSession.noExercises: There are no exercises in this plan yet, so no session can be recorded.
recordSession.emptySets: Fill in at least one completed set.
recordSession.incompleteSet: If you start filling a set, provide weight, reps and RIR completely.
recordSession.readonlyHint: Previously completed sets stay visible here as read-only, so you can continue filling only the remaining exercises.

createExercise.title: New exercise
createExercise.description: Add an exercise to the selected workout day.

editExercise.unavailableMuscleGroups: Muscle group references are temporarily unavailable.

deleteExercise.confirmDescription: This exercise will be removed from the workout day. The change can send the plan back to pending on the backend.

editDay.title: Edit workout day
editDay.description: Update the title and order of this workout day.

deleteDay.confirmDescription: This workout day will be removed from the plan. The change can send the plan back to pending on the backend.

plans.description: Edit only the plans you assigned to this student. After changes, the plan should remain approved.

editPlan.description: Update the title and description. The plan stays approved and assigned to this student.

editDay.description: Update the title and order of this workout day. A coach-assigned plan stays approved.

deleteDay.confirmDescription: This workout day will be removed from the student's plan. A coach-assigned plan should remain approved.
deleteDay.success: Workout day removed from the student plan successfully.
